mapper.select: SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_CONTENT, -- CLOB 서브쿼리 밖에서 조회 TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CREATED_AT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBP.POST_THUMBNAIL_URL, TBS.MEMBER_ID, TBS.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBS.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBS.CATEGORY_ID, TBS.CATEGORY_NAME, TBS.LIKE_COUNT, TBS.IS_LIKE FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN ( SELECT TBP.ID AS POST_ID, TBM.ID AS MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBC.ID AS CATEGORY_ID, TBC.CATEGORY_NAME, COUNT(TBPL.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT, MAX(CASE WHEN TBPL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_LIKE FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY TBC ON TBP.CATEGORY_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TBPL ON TBP.ID = TBPL.POST_ID WHERE TBP.ID = #{postId} AND TBP.POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL GROUP BY TBP.ID, TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBC.ID, TBC.CATEGORY_NAME ) TBS ON TBP.ID = TBS.POST_ID
